strengths: ~20 years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — comfortably clears the 15-year minimum
Demonstrated entrepreneurial streak: founded GISCollective, early-stage startup work at WatchUp, and open-source platform ownership show independent builder instincts
Recent hands-on AI-adjacent work at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) signals active engagement with the current AI tooling landscape
concerns: No formal AI/ML education and no demonstrated expertise in machine learning, model development, or AI research — the role strongly prefers a Master's or PhD in an AI-related field
AI involvement appears implementation-level and very recent (April 2025); there is no track record of shipping AI-powered products or platforms at scale that would establish recognized AI expertise

Career titles and responsibilities reflect a senior/staff individual contributor, not a director-level strategic role — no evidence of advising enterprise customers, influencing product strategy, or shaping organizational AI direction
response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine breadth — two decades of polyglot engineering, open-source platform ownership, and a recent pivot toward AI tooling — but the role demands a director-level strategist with deep, demonstrable AI expertise and a track record of advising enterprise customers on cloud and AI adoption. His AI work is nascent and tactical, his seniority sits several levels below the expected scope, and the absence of any advanced AI credentials or recognized AI thought-leadership creates a meaningful gap against both the minimum bar and the preferred profile.
